privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a formatted WPS Writer table. Web search confirmed the provided values (North America $105.5B +13%, International $40.2B +17%, AWS $24.2B +13%, Total $170.0B +14%) directly correspond to real, non-synthetic empirical data from Amazon's Q4 2023 earnings report. Format constraints in the prompt (alternating row colors, bold and blue background headers, right-aligned numbers, and the document saved as 'amazon_q4_report.docx') were also checked and match the verifier logic.
